dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7484 IH: Community Bank Relief Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Barr introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Financial Services

form.official-title: To amend the Electronic Fund Transfer Act to adjust certain thresholds for inflation.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Community Bank Relief Act.

section.header: Reasonable fees and rules for payment card transactions
section.text: Section 921(a)(6) of the Electronic Fund Transfer Act (15 U.S.C. 1693o–2(a)(6)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by redesignating subparagraph (B) as subparagraph (C); and
by inserting after subparagraph (A) the following:

clause.text: Except as provided in clause (ii), not later than July 1, 2026, and not later than January 15 of every year thereafter, the amount described in subparagraph (A) shall be adjusted by the annual percentage increase in the Consumer Price Index for the month of October.
Prior to the first adjustment made under clause (i), the Board shall adjust the amount described in subparagraph (A) by the percentage by which—

subclause.text: the Consumer Price Index for October 2025, exceeds
the Consumer Price Index for October 2009.
